# Guidelines.md Templates

Figma Make 用 Guidelines.md の構成テンプレート集。プロジェクトタイプ別スターターを含む。

---

## Base Structure

すべてのGuidelines.mdは以下の基本構造に従う：

```markdown
# [Project Name] Design Guidelines
<!-- Generated by Loom | Source: [commit hash] | Date: YYYY-MM-DD -->
<!-- Version: X.Y.Z | Scope: [tokens|components|full] -->

## 1. Design Tokens
## 2. Component Patterns
## 3. Layout Rules
## 4. Naming Conventions
## 5. Do / Don't Examples
```

---

## Section 1: Design Tokens

### Color Tokens

```markdown
## Design Tokens

### Colors

| Semantic Name | Light Value | Dark Value | Usage |
|--------------|-------------|------------|-------|
| `bg-primary` | `#FFFFFF` | `#1A1A2E` | Main background |
| `bg-secondary` | `#F5F5F5` | `#16213E` | Card/section background |
| `text-primary` | `#1A1A2E` | `#EAEAEA` | Body text |
| `text-secondary` | `#6B7280` | `#9CA3AF` | Helper text |
| `accent-primary` | `#3B82F6` | `#60A5FA` | CTA, links, focus rings |
| `border-default` | `#E5E7EB` | `#374151` | Dividers, card borders |
| `status-success` | `#10B981` | `#34D399` | Success states |
| `status-error` | `#EF4444` | `#F87171` | Error states |
| `status-warning` | `#F59E0B` | `#FBBF24` | Warning states |

**Rules:**
- Always use semantic token names, never raw hex values
- Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text on backgrounds
- Status colors must be distinguishable without color alone (use icons)
```

### Spacing Tokens

```markdown
### Spacing

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `space-1` | 4px | Inline icon gaps |
| `space-2` | 8px | Tight element spacing |
| `space-3` | 12px | Form field gaps |
| `space-4` | 16px | Standard content gaps |
| `space-6` | 24px | Section padding |
| `space-8` | 32px | Card padding |
| `space-10` | 40px | Section spacing |
| `space-12` | 48px | Major section dividers |
| `space-16` | 64px | Page section spacing |

**Rules:**
- Base unit: 8px grid
- Use 4px only for inline/icon adjustments
- Padding inside containers: minimum `space-4` (16px)
- Gap between sibling sections: minimum `space-6` (24px)
```

### Typography Tokens

```markdown
### Typography

| Token | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|------------|-------|
| `heading-1` | 32px | 700 | 1.2 | Page titles |
| `heading-2` | 24px | 700 | 1.25 | Section titles |
| `heading-3` | 20px | 600 | 1.3 | Subsection titles |
| `heading-4` | 16px | 600 | 1.4 | Card titles |
| `body-lg` | 16px | 400 | 1.5 | Primary content |
| `body-md` | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Secondary content |
| `body-sm` | 12px | 400 | 1.4 | Captions, labels |
| `label` | 14px | 500 | 1.2 | Form labels, tags |

**Rules:**
- Font family: [Project font stack]
- Maximum 2 font families per page
- Minimum body text size: 14px
- Line height for body text: 1.5 minimum
```

### Shadows & Borders

```markdown
### Shadows & Borders

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `shadow-sm` | 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05) | Subtle lift (buttons) |
| `shadow-md` | 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) | Cards, dropdowns |
| `shadow-lg` | 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) | Modals, popovers |
| `radius-sm` | 4px | Buttons, inputs |
| `radius-md` | 8px | Cards, panels |
| `radius-lg` | 12px | Modals, dialogs |
| `radius-full` | 9999px | Pills, avatars |
| `border-width` | 1px | Default border |

**Rules:**
- Use `shadow-md` for elevated surfaces, `shadow-lg` for overlays only
- Consistent border-radius per component type
- Border color inherits from `border-default` token
```

---

## Section 2: Component Patterns

### Template per Component

```markdown
## Component Patterns

### Button

**Structure:**
- Container: Auto Layout (horizontal, gap: `space-2`, padding: `space-2` `space-4`)
- Icon (optional): 20x20px, `Fill container` disabled
- Label: `label` token, center-aligned

**Variants:**
| Variant | Background | Text | Border |
|---------|-----------|------|--------|
| Primary | `accent-primary` | `#FFFFFF` | none |
| Secondary | transparent | `accent-primary` | `accent-primary` 1px |
| Ghost | transparent | `text-primary` | none |
| Danger | `status-error` | `#FFFFFF` | none |

**Sizes:**
| Size | Height | Font | Padding |
|------|--------|------|---------|
| Small | 32px | `body-sm` | `space-1` `space-3` |
| Medium | 40px | `body-md` | `space-2` `space-4` |
| Large | 48px | `body-lg` | `space-3` `space-6` |

**Auto Layout:**
- Direction: Horizontal
- Alignment: Center
- Resizing: Hug contents (width), Fixed (height per size)

**Do:**
- Use Primary for single main CTA per view
- Include icon + label for destructive actions

**Don't:**
- Stack more than 2 buttons inline
- Use Ghost variant for primary actions
```

---

## Section 3: Layout Rules

```markdown
## Layout Rules

### Grid System
- Columns: 12 (desktop), 8 (tablet), 4 (mobile)
- Gutter: `space-4` (16px) — `space-6` (24px) on desktop
- Margin: `space-4` (mobile), `space-8` (tablet), `space-16` (desktop)
- Max content width: 1280px

### Breakpoints
| Name | Width | Columns |
|------|-------|---------|
| Mobile | < 768px | 4 |
| Tablet | 768-1024px | 8 |
| Desktop | > 1024px | 12 |

### Auto Layout Conventions
- All containers must use Auto Layout (no manual positioning)
- Direction: Vertical for page sections, Horizontal for inline groups
- Gap: Use spacing tokens only
- Resizing: Prefer `Fill container` for main content, `Hug contents` for controls
- Min width on resizable elements for responsive behavior
```

---

## Section 4: Naming Conventions

```markdown
## Naming Conventions

### Layer Naming
- Use kebab-case: `header-nav`, `card-product`, `btn-primary`
- Prefix with component type: `icon-search`, `input-email`, `badge-status`
- No generic names: avoid `Frame 1`, `Group 2`, `Rectangle 3`
- State suffix: `-hover`, `-active`, `-disabled`, `-focus`

### Component Naming
- PascalCase for component names: `ProductCard`, `NavHeader`
- Variant property names match code props: `size`, `variant`, `disabled`
- Boolean properties: `hasIcon`, `isLoading`, `showBadge`

### Page Structure
- Page names: `[Feature] - [State]` (e.g., `Dashboard - Empty State`)
- Section frames: `section-[name]` (e.g., `section-hero`, `section-features`)
```

---

## Project-Type Starters

### SaaS Dashboard Starter

```markdown
# [App Name] Dashboard Guidelines

## Design Tokens
<!-- Standard tokens + SaaS-specific additions -->

### SaaS-Specific Tokens
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `sidebar-width` | 240px | Navigation sidebar |
| `sidebar-collapsed` | 64px | Collapsed sidebar |
| `topbar-height` | 56px | Top navigation bar |
| `table-row-height` | 48px | Data table rows |

## Component Patterns

### Navigation Sidebar
- Structure: Fixed left, vertical Auto Layout
- States: Expanded (240px) / Collapsed (64px)
- Items: icon + label, active indicator left border
- Nested: collapsible groups with chevron

### Data Table
- Structure: Auto Layout vertical
- Header: sticky, `bg-secondary`, `label` typography
- Rows: alternating bg (optional), hover state
- Pagination: bottom-aligned, `body-sm`
- Empty state: centered illustration + message

### Metric Card
- Structure: Auto Layout vertical, padding `space-6`
- Label: `body-sm`, `text-secondary`
- Value: `heading-2`, `text-primary`
- Trend: icon + percentage, colored by direction
- Sparkline: optional, bottom-aligned
```

### E-Commerce Starter

```markdown
# [Store Name] E-Commerce Guidelines

## Component Patterns

### Product Card
- Structure: Auto Layout vertical
- Image: 1:1 aspect ratio, `radius-md`, `Fill container`
- Badge: absolute overlay top-left (Sale/New)
- Title: `heading-4`, max 2 lines, ellipsis
- Price: `body-lg` weight 600, strikethrough for original
- Rating: star icons + count, `body-sm`
- CTA: `Button/Primary/Medium`, full width

### Cart Item
- Structure: Auto Layout horizontal, gap `space-4`
- Thumbnail: 80x80px, `radius-sm`
- Details: Auto Layout vertical (title, variant, price)
- Quantity: stepper control (-, count, +)
- Remove: icon button, `text-secondary`

### Checkout Form
- Structure: Auto Layout vertical, gap `space-6`
- Section: heading + form fields group
- Fields: full width, `space-3` gap between
- Summary: right column on desktop, bottom on mobile
```

### Marketing / Landing Page Starter

```markdown
# [Product] Landing Page Guidelines

## Layout Rules

### Hero Section
- Full width, min-height: 80vh
- Background: gradient or image with overlay
- Content: centered, max-width 720px
- CTA group: primary + secondary button, centered
- Spacing: `space-16` top/bottom padding

### Feature Section
- Grid: 3-column on desktop, single column mobile
- Feature card: icon (48px) + heading + description
- Icon: `accent-primary` color, centered above text
- Equal height cards via Auto Layout

### Testimonial Section
- Carousel or grid layout
- Card: avatar (48px circle) + quote + name + role
- Quote: `body-lg` italic
- Background: `bg-secondary` for contrast
```

---

## Version Management

Guidelines.md には以下のメタデータを含める：

```markdown
<!--
  Version: 1.2.0
  Generated: 2025-01-15T10:30:00Z
  Source commit: abc1234
  Scope: full
  Changes from 1.1.0:
    - Added status-warning token
    - Updated Button padding scale
    - Added Data Table component pattern
-->
```

### Versioning Rules

| Change Type | Version Bump | Example |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| Token value change | PATCH (0.0.X) | `accent-primary` color adjusted |
| New component pattern | MINOR (0.X.0) | Added Data Table pattern |
| Structural reorganization | MAJOR (X.0.0) | Token naming scheme changed |

---

## Guidelines Quality Checklist

Before delivery, verify:

- [ ] All tokens reference actual codebase values
- [ ] Component patterns match existing code components
- [ ] Auto Layout rules are specific (not vague)
- [ ] Do/Don't examples are concrete and visual
- [ ] Naming conventions align with codebase
- [ ] Version metadata is accurate
- [ ] No contradictions between sections
- [ ] Responsive rules cover all breakpoints
